SynapseWeightDef.label: Pawn Identity
SynapseWeightDef.description: Pawn name, gender, and age. Always included in every context.

SynapseWeightDef.label: Event Type
SynapseWeightDef.description: Event type framing text. Always included.

SynapseWeightDef.label: Backstory
SynapseWeightDef.description: Childhood and adulthood backstory text from vanilla RimWorld.

SynapseWeightDef.label: Traits
SynapseWeightDef.description: Pawn trait labels and degrees (e.g., Kind, Psychopath, Tough).

SynapseWeightDef.label: Mood
SynapseWeightDef.description: Current mood level and filtered active thoughts.

SynapseWeightDef.label: Skills
SynapseWeightDef.description: All pawn skills with levels and passions.

SynapseWeightDef.label: Relationships
SynapseWeightDef.description: Direct social bonds (Spouse, Rival, Friend, Parent, etc.).

SynapseWeightDef.label: Opinions
SynapseWeightDef.description: Numeric opinion scores toward other colonists (-100 to +100).

SynapseWeightDef.label: Ideology
SynapseWeightDef.description: Ideology name and precepts (requires Ideology DLC).

SynapseWeightDef.label: Colony
SynapseWeightDef.description: Colony wealth, population, danger level, research.

SynapseWeightDef.label: Factions
SynapseWeightDef.description: Faction names, goodwill, relation type, and leader.

SynapseWeightDef.label: Weighted Memories
SynapseWeightDef.description: AI-generated weighted memories from RimSynapse Psychology mod.

SynapseWeightDef.label: Narrative Threads
SynapseWeightDef.description: Active narrative story threads from RimSynapse Storyteller mod.

SynapseWeightDef.label: Personality Summary
SynapseWeightDef.description: LLM-generated personality summary from RimSynapse Psychology mod.
